projectDescription: A macOS QuickLook extension that renders Markdown files with rich support for Mermaid diagrams, KaTeX math, syntax highlighting, charts, and export — powered by a hybrid Swift + TypeScript architecture.
keyFeatures: macOS QuickLook extension for instant Markdown preview (press Space in Finder)
Mermaid diagram rendering (flowcharts, sequence diagrams, gantt, class diagrams)
KaTeX math rendering (inline and block expressions)
GitHub Flavored Markdown with alerts, task lists, and footnotes
Syntax highlighting for 40+ programming languages via highlight.js
Vega, Vega-Lite, and Graphviz (DOT) chart support
Interactive table of contents with section tracking
Zoom and pan with keyboard shortcuts and trackpad gestures
Position memory — remembers scroll position and last-viewed file
Multiple file format support (.md, .mdx, .rmd, .qmd, .mmd, and more)
Multilingual UI (English, 中文, Deutsch, Français)
publicApiSurface: window.renderMarkdown(content: string) — renders Markdown content in the WebView
window.updateTheme(theme: string) — switches light/dark theme without re-render
make install — build and install from source
make generate — generate Xcode project from project.yml
make build_renderer — build TypeScript web renderer
scripts/analyze-pr.sh <PR_NUMBER> — generate CHANGELOG entry from PR
